ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Nov-07-2017 Continued To Dec-06-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Margaret Burke in Propria Persona.

Ms. Burke stated that she has a report, petition for settlement of the estate and a request for final distribution ready to be filed today. Ms. Burke also informed the Court that she had to file five years of income taxes. Status on close of estate is continued to December 6, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Inventory & Appraisal
Off Calendar Aug-30-2016 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Apr-27-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Margaret Burke in Propria Persona.

The Court stated that this is a petition to probate a will, that it is looking for any additional information regarding the heirs and that it has the further submission that they cannot be found. Ms. Burke stated that she has the proposed order. The Court told Ms. Burke to make sure that she has legal help. Ms. Burke reported that attorney Mark Siedenfeld is assisting on an hourly basis and asked about the probate referee. The Court explained that the referee will be assigned. The Court granted the petition for probate of will and for letters testamentary (subject to review of the order). Status on filing the Inventory & Appraisal is set for August 30, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Status on close of the estate is set for October 24, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Barrientos. (Not Reported)

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Apr-13-2016 Continued To Apr-27-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Mar-16-2016 Continued To Apr-13-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Margaret Burke in Propria Persona.

The Court stated that it is concerned whether there has been a sufficient search for heirs, that information has been provided regarding the mother's family but not the father's side and that a potential heir on the mother's side is deceased but no information regarding issue. Ms. Burke reported that as far as she could tell there are no heirs, that she researched on Ancestry.com, reviewed the census, that the cousin in question moved to Oregon, that the funeral home records do not mention children or an estate, that she has searched social security records and there is nothing to indicate other heirs and that the father was raised in England and there is no one. The Court stated that there are professionals in business to track heirs, that there is a question of if their are more and that that Ms. Burke is not able to say that there are not. Ms. Burke stated that she knew the decedent for 30 years, that living relatives were never mentioned, that heirs were never mentioned, that she has done due diligence, that they were good friends and that Ms. Burke knew the decedents other friends and that the decedent always said she was alone. The Court stated that this issue is why the court is reluctant to have Pro Per Executors and that when searches are done by attorneys they often times bring up heirs. Ms. Burke stated that she is not sure how an attorney could show more diligence and that she could hire someone to check. The Court stated that it does need that before admitting on this petition that more of a search has been done. Ms. Burke stated that she needs to be able to act while searching for heirs, that she needs to set up accounts and that she will need letters. The Court stated that this is another reason to get counsel, that they will know how to get Letters of Special Administration and that it is a good idea to have representation. The petition for probate of will and for letters testamentary was continued to April 13, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Grimaldi. (Not Reported)

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Feb-17-2016 Continued To Mar-16-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
